The '''''Saloon''''' was a [[Muurian transport]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. It was part of the delegation meeting between the Rebels and [[Dunari]] who arrived at the meeting in the [[Personal Luxury Yacht 3000/Legends|Personal Luxury Yacht 3000]] ''[[Raw Deal]]''.

Despite being attacked by both [[Vulture (Marauder-class)|pirates]] and [[Omicron 023|Imperial]] forces, the meeting was finished and successful.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
